name: Apple Pork Roast/cp
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Frzn apple juice concentrate (thaw but do not dilute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any fat from pork.
2. Cut in half, if necessary, to fit into crockpot.
3. Place carrots and celery at the bottom of the crockpot.
4. Sprinkle tapioca over top.
5. Add apple juice concentrate combined with other ingredients.
6. Cover.
7. Cook on Low for 10-12 hours or on High for 5 to 6 hours.
